# Big Data Energy

> Freelance AI consultancy led by Natasha Norsker — helping businesses leverage AI and data science to solve real problems and create measurable value. Based in Copenhagen, Denmark, serving clients worldwide.

## About Natasha Norsker

Natasha Norsker is a freelance data scientist and ML engineer with a degree in AI & Data from DTU (Technical University of Denmark), 6+ years of hands-on experience in the field of AI, and a track record of delivering real-world AI impact across industries.

She has worked as an AI consultant, led technical projects in fast-moving teams, facilitated workshops, and advised decision-makers. She is a certified Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer, the founder of Women in AI Denmark, and has been nominated for multiple tech awards.

What sets her apart is her ability to move fluidly between strategy and execution — from shaping AI ideas to building full-stack solutions ready for production. Whether working with international teams or speaking to 650+ people, she focuses on cutting through complexity and helping businesses make AI work.

## Services

### Freelance Data Scientist
Machine learning expertise — embedded in your team. Works as an integrated part of your team, contributing as a data scientist with an ML engineering perspective. From building models to deploying them, brings hands-on AI experience and thrives in cross-functional environments — remote or in-house, local or global.
- End-to-end ML and AI workflows: modelling, evaluation, deployment
- Experience collaborating with engineers, analysts, designers & PMs
- Builds robust, testable code with best practices in MLOps and DevOps

### AI Use Case Validation & Discovery
Clarify where AI adds value — and how to get started. Helps businesses translate AI curiosity into concrete opportunities. Through structured workshops and technical insight, uncovers the use cases worth building — and helps avoid those that aren't.
- Identify valuable, data-driven AI use cases
- Assess feasibility from both business and tech angles
- Deliver a prioritized shortlist of validated AI use cases and actionable next steps

### Public Speaking & Keynotes
Inspiring, engaging talks on AI, innovation, and real-world impact. Speaks at conferences, company events, and podcasts about how AI works in the real world — and why it matters. Talks combine technical depth with energy, clarity, and a no-nonsense approach that cuts through the hype.
- Experience speaking to audiences from 20 to 650+, across diverse industries and roles
- Topics include: applied AI, generative models, women in tech, and digital innovation
- Talks tailored to your audience — from engineers to executive leadership

### Workshops & Training
Practical, engaging learning sessions for teams and leaders. Designs and facilitates workshops that help teams understand, explore, and apply AI in their own context. Whether getting started or looking to deepen internal capabilities, creates space for learning, discussion, and momentum.
- Hands-on workshops tailored to your team's goals, level, and industry
- Formats from 2-hour sessions to full-day deep dives
- Ideal for product teams, tech departments, leadership groups, or cross-functional audiences

### End-to-End AI Solutions
From idea to production. Takes on complete AI projects — from initial scoping and model development to deployment and handover. Whether building a first AI solution or scaling an existing one, brings a structured, technically grounded approach that delivers.
- Full-cycle development: scoping, modelling, evaluation, and tuning
- Deployment-ready code built with MLOps best practices
- Clear documentation, smooth handover, and optional support

### Full-Stack Development
Web, APIs, and deployment — built for real-world use. Designs and builds full-stack applications that support data and AI workflows. From custom websites to internal tools and API services, delivers fast, scalable, and maintainable solutions.
- Frontend and backend development for web-based tools
- API design and integration for ML models and data services
- Deployment and delivery pipelines (cloud-based or custom)

## Projects

### AI Content Platform for Pharmaceutical Marketing
Client: Anthill · Arcane · 2024–present
Embedded AI consultant on Arcane — Anthill's production AI platform for pharmaceutical and life science marketing teams. The platform enables compliant content authoring, multilingual generation across 130+ languages, automated citations from approved medical sources, and AI-assisted email production — all within regulatory guardrails built on AWS Bedrock.
Tags: AWS Bedrock, Pharmaceutical AI, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Multilingual, Production ML

### Automated CO₂ Emissions Tracking from Supplier Invoices
Client: Todai · 2022–2024
Built an end-to-end CO₂ emissions pipeline for a Danish B2B services marketplace — automatically calculating the carbon footprint of every office service purchase across their client base. The system extracts and classifies product data from unstructured supplier documents, matches products to emission databases using LLM embeddings, converts to standardised kg-equivalent units, and allocates total CO₂ responsibility back to each company per vendor per month.
Tags: OCR, LLM Embeddings, Climate Data, EU Compliance, CO₂ Tracking, NLP

### Product Taxonomy & Deduplication for a Global Social Shopping Platform
Client: Todai · Social Shopping Client · 2022–2024
Worked on the product classification and taxonomy system for a rapidly scaling social shopping platform — users can add any product from any website in the world, meaning an enormous variety of inconsistently structured product data needs to be classified into one unified taxonomy tree. Solved using a combination of ML models and LLMs.
Tags: Taxonomy Classification, Product Deduplication, NLP, LLMs, E-commerce, Data Aggregation

### Insurance-Compliant Product Matching for Contents Claims
Client: Todai · InsurTech Client · 2022–2024
Built a production ML system for a leading Danish InsurTech company — given any product in the world, the model returns the top three closest matches from a curated product database, ensuring every suggestion complies with the customer's insurance policy rules.
Tags: Product Matching, Insurance Tech, Semantic Search, Data Aggregation, Compliance, Production ML

### Detecting Online Predatory Behaviour Using Graph Neural Networks
DTU · Bachelor Thesis · January 2023 · Grade 12
Bachelor thesis investigating whether unsupervised Graph Neural Networks could detect sexual predators on online gaming platforms — without relying on linguistic analysis. Examined social network patterns within a children's online social gaming platform to identify anomalous behaviour indicative of grooming.
Tags: Graph Neural Networks, Child Safety, Anomaly Detection, DTU, Unsupervised ML

### Multi-Market Sales Forecasting Model for a Global Retailer
Client: eCapacity · 2020–2022
Built and maintained a production sales forecasting system for a leading global retailer — used directly by senior decision makers to forecast country and global sales and model the impact of promotions across markets.
Tags: Time Series, Sales Forecasting, Production ML, Promotion Modelling, Multi-Market

### Analytics Dashboards for Multi-Market Retailers
Client: eCapacity · 2020–2022
Designed and maintained analytics dashboards for multiple large multi-market retailers — each with different data sources, analytics platforms (Adobe Analytics and Google Analytics), market setups, and KPI frameworks.
Tags: Adobe Analytics, Google Analytics, Dashboards, Multi-Market, Retail, Data Strategy

### Visual Search & Product Similarity for a Global Jewellery Brand
Client: eCapacity · 2021
Built a deep learning model for a leading global jewellery brand's e-commerce catalogue using contrastive learning and an autoencoder architecture. Primary goal was visual search: allowing customers to search by image rather than text.
Tags: Deep Learning, Contrastive Learning, Visual Search, Recommendation Systems, E-commerce

## Workshops, Talks & Recognition

### Published: Tænk agentisk
AI Agentbogen · Jonathan Løw · September 2025
Contributing author in AI Agentbogen — Denmark's most important book on AI in 2025. Wrote the chapter on how businesses and employees can prepare for AI agents.

### Talk: Executive Conversations — Fra Hype til Afkast
Computerworld · SAP · SOHO House · January 2025
One of four invited speakers at Executive Conversations — gathering 40 senior business leaders to discuss AI from hype to real returns.

### Radio: Danmark skal afdigitaliseres?
Tager jeg fejl · Radio 4 · Denmark
Invited expert on Radio 4's debate programme discussing whether Denmark has gone too far with digitalisation.

### Webinar: AI & The New Talent Playbook
Connected Women in AI · Webinar Series · May 2025
Panelist exploring how AI is reshaping talent, recruitment, and professional development.

### Moderator: Women in AI — Pioneering the Future of Startups and Innovation
TechBBQ · Google Stage · Copenhagen · September 2024
Moderator on the Google Stage at TechBBQ Copenhagen — one of the largest startup conferences in the Nordics.

### Talk: Fra Data til Forretningsværdi
Computerworld Cloud Festival · Copenhagen · 2024
Invited speaker on how companies can transform data into valuable business insights.

### Talk: Operational AI and its Impact on Real Estate
ULI Denmark · Gorrissen Federspiel · June 2024
Opening speaker on the latest AI trends and their relevance to the property industry.

### Podcast: Applied AI Nordics — Live Podcast
Verbos Podcast · Episode 51 · April 2024
Featured guest recorded live at Applied AI Nordics 2024 in DR Koncerthuset.

### Keynote: Let's Get Practical on AI
Applied AI Nordics · Copenhagen · April 2024
Closing keynote at the largest applied AI conference in the Nordics, audience of 600+ AI professionals.

### Workshop: AI Value Creation for Board Members
Bestyrelseskvinder · Copenhagen · 2023
Led a session for board-level women on three decisive ways to create value with AI.

### Podcast: AI før og efter ChatGPT
Verbos Podcast · Episode 40 · 2023
Discussed the evolution of AI before and after ChatGPT, work as an AI consultant, and Graph Neural Networks.

### Panel: Conversations Unscripted
Microsoft · Denmark · 2023
Cross-industry initiative with Microsoft, Deloitte, and IT-Branchen on inclusive technological progress within AI in Denmark.

### Panel: Supertrends — AI & Machine Learning
Datacenter Changemakers · Copenhagen · 2023
Panelist at the 8th annual Datacenter Forum Copenhagen, attended by 300+ datacenter professionals.

### Award: Agnes & Betzy Prisen
IDA — Ingeniørforeningen i Danmark
Awarded for combining strong technical skills with a meaningful contribution to diversity and knowledge sharing in engineering.

### Title: Role Model of the Year
Nordic Women in Tech Awards · 2023
Recognised for founding Women in AI Denmark and advocating for greater visibility and representation for women in tech.

### Nomination: Developer of the Year
Nordic Women in Tech Awards · 2023
Nominated while serving as first data scientist at Todai — delivering end-to-end ML projects across recommendation systems, document intelligence, and generative AI.

### Finalist: Rising Star
Nordic Women in Tech Awards · 2024
Selected as Denmark's finalist — one of five chosen across the Nordic countries.
